metadata.no_auto_align_reason: Accepted r03 has recent TrackCenter and multiple completed pODMR/Ramsey jobs with final counts >=38 kcps; use explicit tracked position and avoid hidden target reselection.

analysis_plan.notes: No automatic fit request in bridge job. Review terminal raw/readouts and FFT at det=1.0 MHz, det +/- 13C Larmor, and prior 0.884 MHz component.

metadata.frequency_basis: fine weak-pi pODMR terminal raw/readout review selected grid-supported mw_freq=3.8759 GHz; no sub-grid precision claim.
metadata.det_choice_reason: Use det=1.0 MHz to test whether Ramsey spectral content follows the programmed phase ramp after the det=1.5 MHz scout produced a non-claim-grade ~0.884 MHz component; expected 13C sidebands are near 0.615 and 1.385 MHz.
metadata.fft_sampling_reason: 8 us / 41 points gives dt=0.2 us, Nyquist=2.5 MHz and 125 kHz nominal resolution, covering det=1.0 MHz, det +/- ~0.3845 MHz 13C sidebands, and the prior 0.884 MHz exploratory component.
metadata.shot_reason: Use 8 x 50000 = 400000 shots per tau point, doubling the first Ramsey scout shots while keeping repetitions per average unchanged so the per-average tracking window is not lengthened.
metadata.even_average_reason: Use 8 averages under snake/even-average guidance; latest fine-pODMR and Ramsey drift diagnostics flag no averages.
metadata.intent: Second Ramsey/T2star/13C follow-up on accepted r03 using fine-pODMR center 3.8759 GHz and det=1.0 MHz diagnostic phase ramp; raw/FFT review required before any T2star or 13C claim.
